Body.Content:
Presenting PowerPoint slides in Teams just got better. PowerPoint Live now supports light mode, giving presenters the option to present in light, dark, classic, or high contrast mode based on their preferences and system settings.

GA date: August CY2026
Body.Markdown:
Presenting PowerPoint slides in Teams just got better. PowerPoint Live now supports light mode, giving presenters the option to present in light, dark, classic, or high contrast mode based on their preferences and system settings.

GA date: August CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Teams: PowerPoint Live Light theme support
